landing.heroSubtitle: Schedule, publish, and analyze across all platforms from one dashboard. Built for creators and small teams.
landing.feature1Desc: Write once, publish to Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, and Bluesky. Automatically adapts content for each platform.
landing.feature2Desc: Schedule posts for optimal times. Calendar view shows your content pipeline at a glance.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate, rewrite, and translate posts with AI. Get hashtag suggestions and engagement predictions.
landing.feature4Desc: Track impressions, engagement, and follower growth across all platforms in one unified view.
landing.feature5Desc: Upload and manage images and videos. Drag media directly into your posts.
landing.feature6Desc: OAuth tokens encrypted with AES-256. Your data stays yours. Open source under AGPL-3.0.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.freeFeatures: 3 social accounts, 100 posts/month, 20 AI generations, 500MB storage, 30-day analytics
pricing.proFeatures: Unlimited accounts, Unlimited posts, 200 AI generations, 10GB storage, 12-month analytics, 5 team members
pricing.businessFeatures: Everything in Pro, Unlimited AI, Custom domain, API access, Priority support, White-label
